# sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_project (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Monitoring Suite Alert Project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_project" "foobar" {
  name = "foobar"
  # or
  # id = "alert-project-resource-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Alert Project.
- `name` (String) The name of the Monitoring Suite Alert Project.
- `resource_id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Alert Project.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the Monitoring Suite Alert Project
- `description` (String) The description of the Monitoring Suite Alert Project.
- `project_id` (String) The resource ID of the project to which the Alert Project belongs.
